 wrapper-mems                                                            q quit 
 [O]bservations   [C]onflicts (0)   [S]tatus   [?]Help 
Global                                Observations                          
  O              Switch to              /              Focus filter input   
Observations                            ↑ / k          Move selection up    
  C              Switch to Conflicts    ↓ / j          Move selection down  
  S              Switch to Status       enter          Full-screen detail   
  ?              Switch to Help         esc            Clear filter / exit  
  q / ctrl+c     Quit                 detail                                
                                        c              Copy canonical_id    
Conflicts                             (OSC52)                               
  w              Accept winner (--keep  f              Cycle kind filter    
1)                                      t              Cycle type filter    
  l              Promote loser  (--     g / G          Top / bottom         
keep 2)                                 r              Reload from disk     
  s              Skip conflict                                              
                                      Status                                
                                        s              Run sync (full)      
                                        p              Run sync pull        
                                        P              Run sync push        
                                        r              Refresh status data  
                                                                            

 O:obs  C:conflicts  S:status  ?:help  q:quit
